title: Always-On AI Automation Daemon -- AppBot Eye Internals
desc: Eye = always-on overlay + Slack daemon + MCP broker in one process. FSW hybrid dirty-check: event flags (~0ms) + 1s FileInfo safety net. MCP workers isolated via DETACHED_PROCESS (ConPTY LPC deadlock prevention). Hot-swap: detects core.new.exe stamp -> defers if admin pipe busy -> skips same failed stamp -> spawns new Eye. Admin proxy: named pipe wkappbot_elevated, amber border when admin-capable.
steps: Guardian watchdog (v6.1): AppBotEyeWindow has internal render-freeze detector; AppBotEyeCommands has external guardian with gentle-swap -> WM_CLOSE escalation when WPF render thread freezes while IPC remains alive

Eye render-freeze detection: AppBotEyeWindow.OnCloakTick() writes unix timestamp to runtime/eye-render-tick.txt on the WPF Dispatcher thread every tick. Guardian reads this file; if age > 60s, render thread is considered frozen.

Guardian recovery: gentle-swap (eye tick --swap-now) at 60s freeze, WM_CLOSE at longer freeze threshold. IPC heartbeat and WPF render heartbeat are independent -- IPC alive does NOT mean render alive.
author: claude
